title: Cholavandān Heat Wave
lead: Cholavandān is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.11. The current conditions are at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave in Cholavandān has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, which is contributing to the discomfort. 
 The wind speed of 9.6 km/h is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
